name: codeclipper
description: Quickly copy the current filename and selected line numbers to the clipboard (e.g., versions.js line 22-23) via the right-click context menu.

codeclipper.format.description: Output format for copied file and line references.

codeclipper.pathStyle.description: How {filename} is resolved in prompt templates.

codeclipper.showInContextMenu.description: Show the CodeClipper submenu in the editor right-click context menu. Disable to use the command palette or keyboard shortcuts only.

name.description: Short label shown in the menu.

prompt.description: Full prompt text copied to the clipboard.

active.description: When false, this prompt is hidden from the menu. Defaults to true.

default.name: Handoff
default.prompt: Review the current state of this project and generate a HANDOFF.md file that gives the next session enough context to continue without reconstructing history. Include: what the project does, the current state of the code, any decisions made and why, what is left to do, and any known issues or gotchas.

default.name: Explain Code
default.prompt: Explain what the code in {filename} does. Describe the intent, the key steps, any non-obvious behavior, and any side effects. Write for a reader who understands the language but is unfamiliar with this part of the codebase.

default.name: Code Review
default.prompt: Review the code in {filename} for correctness, clarity, and potential issues. Point out bugs, edge cases, security concerns, and anything that would surprise a future reader. Be specific and suggest concrete improvements.

default.name: Refactor
default.prompt: Suggest refactoring improvements for {filename}. Focus on reducing complexity, improving naming, eliminating duplication, and making the code easier to test. Do not change behavior. Explain each suggestion briefly.

default.name: Write Tests
default.prompt: Write tests for {filename}. Cover the happy path, edge cases, and expected failure modes. Prefer small focused tests over large integration tests. Use the testing style and framework already present in the project.

default.name: Bug Report
default.prompt: Help me write a clear bug report for the following issue in {filename}. Include: a one-sentence summary, steps to reproduce, expected behavior, actual behavior, and any relevant context or environment details.

default.name: Run as prompt
default.prompt: Follow the instructions in {filename}. If there are lines referenced, treat only that section as the input; otherwise use the whole file.

codeclipper.prompts.description: List of named prompts available in CodeClipper: Select Prompt. Each item needs a short 'name' (shown in the menu) and a 'prompt' (copied to clipboard when selected).

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.deploy:local: npm run compile && npm run package:local && npm run install:local
